inputs.value: Wide low-angle shot showing the lone armored knight standing on the foreground stone bridge, facing the colossal mountain fortress in the midground under a stormy sky. The camera begins a slow push-in, creating strong layered parallax depth where the foreground bridge stones and the knight shift at a different visual speed than the midground fortress walls and the distant snowy mountains. Snow blows steadily across the bridge from left to right. The knight’s long cloak flutters in the wind. Torch flames near the gate flicker and cast soft warm light against the cold stone. The camera executes a slow lateral drift to the right while continuing a subtle push-in, emphasizing layered parallax depth between the foreground bridge edge, the midground walls and towers, and the distant mountain background. Long hanging banners attached to the fortress sway violently in the wind. Snow gusts sweep diagonally across the frame. Torchlight at the gate pulses and flickers against the stone archways.
